reasons: probably a decent buy after Berkshire exited
mentions.text:
@LibertadEterno Completely ignore it, it's better to make independent decisions based on companies. Only upside is if it helps you know when they panic sell, but you usually see mainstream news about it. 

Eg. when Berkshire exited $BYD it's probably a decent buy now.

Or when everyone was panic selling $ALAB at $50 was a good time to buy. 

Many of them all exited $SG so good time to buy now too.

reasons: stays away from Chinese companies out of principle
mentions.text:
@investingluc @xiaopenghexpeng I stay away from Chinese companies like $XPEV just out of principle of not funding geopolitical opponents. Especially when it comes to military enabling technology like AI and robotics. 

Otherwise $XPEV and $BYD are both very interesting companies.
